comments.body: Basically we want content in the volumes removed.
So this should remove the whole volume directory and unmount it, or just the contents inside the volume directory?

Well I don't this there is anything mounted.  I believe this is only for builtin volumes, not for the case where you bind mounted something on disk into the container.

In our case right now, if you run a image that was built with a VOLUME flag in the Dockerfile, we create content.
If I do a podman rm --volumes, the content should be removed.
@umohnani8 Ok, so then this is not an issue and not something we need to support.
@edsantiago We don't need or supprot podman rm --volume.
